g.text: Digital Credential Verification (Backend-Assisted VP Creation with Mobile Holder Signing + Remote Credential Model)
2. Backend validates Verifier before creating any proof request
permission to request Driving License verification
Request rejected before creating proof request
4. Backend gets Credential Schema to map claim keys to claim IDs
Backend maps requested claim keys to claimSchemaId
5. Backend creates Proof Schema using claimSchema IDs
9. Backend re-validates Verifier trust before showing consent
Ignore verification request and do not show consent to Holder
Can this verifier request these claims?
11. Holder Wallet selects matching credential reference
Check credential reference metadata matches requested schema
Mobile Wallet stores credentialId + metadata only
Full VC payload is NOT stored on device
Procivis Core is source of truth for VC payload
12. Data Minimization and Selective Disclosure Decision
or request derived proof if supported
13. Holder reviews requested data before sharing
14. Holder confirms consent and asks Backend to prepare VP
Confirm consent and request VP preparation
15. Backend validates consent and request state before preparing VP
must be subset of requested claims only
belongs to holder account / holder identifier
[Request invalid / expired / verifier no longer trusted / consent invalid]
Request invalid / expired / verifier not trusted / consent invalid
Request invalid or trust validation failed
16. Backend retrieves credential payload from Procivis Core after consent
credential is linked to selected holder identifier
VC payload is retrieved on-demand from Procivis Core
Backend does not persist full VC payload after VP preparation
Mobile never receives full VC payload
Only selected claims are used for VP payload
17. Backend prepares canonical VP payload without holder signature
Extract selected claims from retrieved VC payload
presentation is for this verifier only
unsigned VP / signing input / hash to sign
18. Backend sends signing challenge to Mobile Wallet
19. Mobile Wallet signs VP payload using holder private key
same credential reference user consented to share
Sign canonical VP payload or hash
[Holder signing failed / key unavailable / user cancels]
reason = signing failed / key unavailable / user cancelled
20. Mobile Wallet returns holder signature to Backend
21. Backend validates holder signature before assembling VP
against canonical VP payload or hash
Validate signed payload matches retrieved credential
[Holder signature invalid / request expired / verifier no longer trusted]
Invalid holder signature / request expired / verifier not trusted
Holder proof invalid or request invalid
Final VP contains selected claims only
Clear temporary VC payload from processing memory/cache
do not persist full VC payload
23. Backend submits signed presentation to Procivis Core
Signed VP with selected claims + holder proof
24. Procivis Core verifies VP and credential
get issuer verification method / public key
reason = Credential revoked / suspended / status unknown
issuer and verifier allowed for this credential type
reason = signature / expiry / schema / policy validation failed
reason = cryptographic / schema / policy validation failed
28. Backend stores audit log and returns result
